Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.configuration.Configurable

Packages that use Configurable
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.configuration
Support for configuring algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary
Collection of operators for binary-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar
Collection of operators for grammars for use with Grammatical Evolution (GE).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation
Collection of operators for permutation variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.program
Collection of operators for expression trees for use with Genetic Programming (GP).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.real
Collection of operators for real-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset
Collection of operators for subset variables.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class providing default implementations for several EvolutionaryAlgorithm methods.
    class 
    AGEMOEAII
    Implementation of AGE-MOEA-II, which is an adaptive evolutionary algorithm that estimates the Pareto front geometry and uses this to score solutions during selection.
    class 
    CMAES
    The Covariance Matrix Adaption Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) algorithm for single and multi-objective problems.
    class 
    DBEA
    Implementation of the Improved Decomposition-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (I-DBEA).
    class 
    EpsilonMOEA
    Implementation of the ε-MOEA algorithm.
    class 
    EpsilonNSGAII
    Implements the ε-NSGA-II algorithm.
    class 
    GDE3
    Implementation of the Generalized Differential Evolution (GDE3) algorithm.
    class 
    IBEA
    Implementation of the Indicator-Based Evolutionary Algorithm (IBEA).
    class 
    MOEAD
    Implementation of MOEA/D, the multiobjective evolutionary algorithm with decomposition.
    class 
    MSOPS
    Implementation of the Multiple Single Objective Pareto Sampling (MSOPS) algorithm.
    class 
    NSGAII
    Implementation of NSGA-II, with the ability to attach an optional ε-dominance archive.
    class 
    NSGAIII
    Implementation of NSGA-III.
    class 
    PAES
    Implementation of the (1+1) Pareto Archived Evolution Strategy (PAES).
    class 
    PESA2
    Implementation of the Pareto Envelope-based Selection Algorithm (PESA2).
    class 
    RandomSearch
    Random search implementation.
    class 
    RVEA
    Implementation of the Reference Vector Guided Evolutionary Algorithm (RVEA).
    class 
    SMSEMOA
    Implementation of the S-metric Selection MOEA (SMS-MOEA).
    class 
    SPEA2
    Implementation of the strength-based evolutionary algorithm (SPEA2).
    class 
    SPEA2.StrengthFitnessEvaluator
    Fitness evaluator for the strength measure with crowding-based niching.
    class 
    UNSGAIII
    Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.
    class 
    VEGA
    Implementation of the Vector Evaluated Genetic Algorithm (VEGA).

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension instead
    class 
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension
    Decorator for EvolutionaryAlgorithms to add time continuation (restarts).
    class 
    EpsilonProgressContinuation
    Deprecated.
    Use EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension instead
    class 
    EpsilonProgressContinuationExtension
    Extends AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension to trigger restarts using ε-progress.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AlgorithmWrapper<T extends Algorithm>
    Wrapper for an algorithm.
    class 
    Extensions
    A collection of Extension associated with an Algorithm.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractPSOAlgorithm
    Abstract multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    OMOPSO
    Implementation of OMOPSO, a multi-objective particle swarm optimizer (MOPSO).
    class 
    SMPSO
    Implementation of SMPSO, the speed-constrained multi-objective particle swarm optimizer.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa

    Subinterfaces of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    CoolingSchedule
    Defines a cooling schedule for simulated annealing algorithms.
    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm
    Abstract class of fundamental simulated annealing algorithm.
    class 
    AMOSA
    Implementation of the simulated annealing-based multiobjective optimization algorithm (AMOSA).
    class 
    GeometricCoolingSchedule
    Geometric reduction rule for simulated annealing.
    class 
    TemperatureBasedTerminationCondition
    Terminates a simulated annealing algorithm when the temperature drops below a stopping, or minimum, temperature.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single

    Classes in org.moeaframework.algorithm.single that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DifferentialEvolution
    Single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
    class 
    EvolutionStrategy
    Single-objective (mu + lambda) evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
    class 
    GeneticAlgorithm
    Single-objective genetic algorithm (GA) implementation with elitism.
    class 
    SelfAdaptiveNormalVariation
    Self adaptive variation based on the normal distribution.
    class 
    SimulatedAnnealing
    Implementation of single-objective simulated annealing.
    class 
    SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm
    Abstract class for building single-objective evolutionary algorithms.

    Classes in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InstrumentedAlgorithm<T extends Algorithm>
    Wraps an algorithm to indicate it is instrumented to collect runtime data.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Variation
    Interface for variation operators.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.core.configuration

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.configuration with parameters of type Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    ConfigurationUtils.applyConfiguration(TypedProperties properties, Configurable object)
    Updates the properties in the configurable object (and all nested configurable objects recursively).
    static void
    ConfigurationUtils.applyConfiguration(TypedProperties properties, Configurable object, Problem problem)
    Updates the properties in the configurable object (and all nested configurable objects recursively).
    static TypedProperties
    ConfigurationUtils.getConfiguration(Configurable object)
    Reads and returns all properties used by the configurable object.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.core.operator

    Subinterfaces of Configurable in org.moeaframework.core.operator
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Mutation
    Identifies mutation operators that evolve exactly one parent.
    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.operator that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractCompoundVariation<T extends Variation>
    Constructs a variation operator applying two or more variations sequentially.
    class 
    AdaptiveMultimethodVariation
    Auto-adaptive multi-method recombination operator.
    class 
    CompoundMutation
    Versions of CompoundVariation that only supports mutation operators.
    class 
    CompoundVariation
    Construct a variation operator applying one or more variations sequentially.
    class 
    OnePointCrossover
    One-point or single-point crossover.
    class 
    TwoPointCrossover
    Two-point crossover.
    class 
    TypeSafeCrossover<T extends Variable>
    An abstract variation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the crossover operation with a given probability.
    class 
    TypeSafeMutation<T extends Variable>
    An abstract mutation class that validates the types of each variable before applying the mutation operation with a given probability.
    class 
    UniformCrossover
    Crossover operator where each index is randomly swapped between the parents with a 50% chance.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    BitFlip
    Bit flip mutation operator.
    class 
    HUX
    Half-uniform crossover (HUX) operator.

    Class

    Insertion
    Insertion mutation operator.

    PMX

    Swap mutation operator.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.core.operator.program

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.operator.program that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PointMutation
    Mutates a program by randomly selecting nodes in the expression tree and replacing the node with a new, compatible, randomly-selected node.
    class 
    SubtreeCrossover
    Exchanges a randomly-selected subtree from one program with a compatible, randomly-selected subtree from another program.

  • Uses of Configurable in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real

    Classes in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real that implement Configurable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveMetropolis
    The adaptive metropolis (AM) operator.
    class 
    DifferentialEvolutionVariation
    Differential evolution (DE) variation operator.
    class 
    MultiParentVariation
    Abstract class for operators that can take a variable number of parents and produce a variable number of offspring.
    class 
    PCX
    Parent-centric crossover (PCX) operator.
    class 
    PM
    Polynomial mutation (PM) operator.
    class 
    SBX
    Simulated binary crossover (SBX) operator.
    class 
    SPX
    Simplex crossover (SPX) operator.
    class 
    UM
    Uniform mutation (UM) operator.
    class 
    UNDX
    Unimodal Normal Distribution Crossover (UNDX) operator.
